Online payment processing is an essential feature of modern web applications, and Stripe is one of the most popular payment gateways for accepting secure online payments. Combined with Node.js, developers can build fast, scalable, and secure payment solutions with minimal effort.
In this article, you’ll learn how to integrate Stripe APIs into a Node.js application step by step. Whether you’re a beginner or an experienced developer looking to add payment functionality to your project, this guide will walk you through everything you need — from setting up a Stripe account and configuring API keys to creating payment intents and handling successful payments.
By the end of this article, you’ll have a working Stripe payment integration and a solid understanding of how Stripe APIs work with Node.js.
Setting Up a Stripe Account and Getting API Keys
Before integrating Stripe into your Node.js application, you need to create a Stripe account and obtain your API keys.
Follow these simple steps:

• Visit the Stripe website and click Start now or Sign Up.

• Create an account using your email address and…
